nasb.text: ‘Now when you bring an offering of a grain offering baked in an oven, it shall be unleavened cakes of fine flour mixed with oil, or unleavened wafers spread with oil.

esv.text: “When you bring a grain offering baked in the oven as an offering, it shall be unleavened loaves of fine flour mixed with oil or unleavened wafers smeared with oil.

cnv.text: “如果你獻爐裡烤的物作素祭的供物，就要用細麵調油所做的無酵餅，或是抹上油的無酵薄餅。

ccb.text: “如果献用炉子烤的素祭，要献调油的无酵细面饼，或涂油的无酵薄饼。
